name: gnome-extensions
title: GNOME Extensions
description: Manage your GNOME Shell extensions - list, enable, disable, open preferences and so on
author: system7

commands.name: gnome-extensions
commands.title: GNOME Extensions
commands.subtitle: Manage GNOME Shell extensions
commands.description: List installed GNOME extensions, enable/disable them, open preferences dialog etc.

preferences.name: extensionManagerPath
preferences.title: Extension Manager Path
preferences.description: Path to your extension manager command (default: gnome-extensions or gnome-extensions-app)

preferences.name: showDisabled
preferences.title: Show Disabled Extensions
preferences.label: Show Disabled Extensions
preferences.description: Include disabled extensions in the list
